title: Senior SEO Specialist at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates:
Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates!
